practice.name: Problem 19 (2023 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: The line segment from $A(1, 2)$ to $B(3, 3)$ can be transformed to the line segment from $A'(3, 1)$ to $B'(4, 3)$, sending $A$ to $A'$ and $B$ to $B'$, by a rotation centered at the point $P(s, t)$. What is $|s - t|$?

practice.name: Problem 18 (2014 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: A square in the coordinate plane has vertices whose $y$-coordinates are $0$, $1$, $4$, and $5$. What is the area of the square?

practice.name: Problem 10 (2023 AMC 12B)
practice.statement: In the $xy$-plane, a circle of radius $4$ with center on the positive $x$-axis is tangent to the $y$-axis at the origin, and a circle of radius $10$ with center on the positive $y$-axis is tangent to the $x$-axis at the origin. What is the slope of the line passing through the two points at which these circles intersect?

practice.name: Problem 10 (1991 AJHSME)
practice.statement: The area in square units of the region enclosed by parallelogram $ABCD$ is [See figure in original PDF]

practice.name: Problem 17 (1996 AJHSME)
practice.statement: Figure $OPQR$ is a square. Point $O$ is the origin, and point $Q$ has coordinates $(2, 2)$. What are the coordinates for $T$ so that the area of triangle $PQT$ equals the area of square $OPQR$? [See figure in original PDF]

practice.name: Problem 11 (2001 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Points $A$, $B$, $C$ and $D$ have these coordinates: $A(3,2)$, $B(3,-2)$, $C(-3,-2)$ and $D(-3,0)$. The area of quadrilateral $ABCD$ is

practice.name: Problem 24 (2003 AMC 8)
practice.statement: A ship travels from point $A$ to point $B$ along a semicircular path, centered at Island $X$. Then it travels along a straight path from $B$ to $C$. Which of these graphs best shows the ship's distance from Island $X$ as it moves along its course? [See figure in original PDF]

practice.name: Problem 17 (2005 AMC 8)
practice.statement: The results of a cross-country team's training run are graphed below. Which student has the greatest average speed? [See figure in original PDF]

practice.name: Problem 10 (2006 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Jorge's teacher asks him to plot all the ordered pairs $(w, l)$ of positive integers for which $w$ is the width and $l$ is the length of a rectangle with area $12$. What should his graph look like? [See figure in original PDF]

practice.name: Problem 19 (2015 AMC 8)
practice.statement: A triangle with vertices as $A=(1,3)$, $B=(5,1)$, and $C=(4,4)$ is plotted on a $6 \times 5$ grid. What fraction of the grid is covered by the triangle? [See figure in original PDF]

practice.name: Problem 21 (2019 AMC 8)
practice.statement: What is the area of the triangle formed by the lines $y=5$, $y=1+x$, and $y=1-x$?

practice.name: Problem 18 (2022 AMC 8)
practice.statement: The midpoints of the four sides of a rectangle are $(-3, 0)$, $(2, 0)$, $(5, 4)$ and $(0, 4)$. What is the area of the rectangle?

practice.name: Problem 7 (2023 AMC 8)
practice.statement: A rectangle, with sides parallel to the $x$-axis and $y$-axis, has opposite vertices located at $(15,3)$ and $(16,5)$. A line is drawn through points $A(0,0)$ and $B(3,1)$. Another line is drawn through points $C(0,10)$ and $D(2,9)$. How many points on the rectangle lie on at least one of the two lines? [See figure in original PDF]

practice.name: Problem 11 (2024 AMC 8)
practice.statement: The coordinates of $\triangle ABC$ are $A(5,7)$, $B(11,7)$, $C(3,y)$, with $y > 7$. The area of $\triangle ABC$ is $12$. What is the value of $y$?

practice.name: Problem 23 (2024 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Rodrigo has a very large sheet of graph paper. First he draws a line segment connecting point $(0, 4)$ to point $(2,0)$ and colors the $4$ cells whose interiors intersect the segment, as shown below. Next Rodrigo draws a line segment connecting point $(2000, 3000)$ to point $(5000, 8000)$. How many cells will he color this time? [See figure in original PDF]
